channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Air Force says former Qatari 747 will be ready to fly as Air Force One this summer
item.description: The U.S. Air Force has finished modifying and testing a Boeing 747 jet donated by Qatar for temporary use as Air Force One and expects to have it ready for President Trump to use this summer.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. Air Force has finished modifying and testing a Boeing 747 jet donated by Qatar for temporary use as Air Force One and expects to have it ready for President Trump to use this summer.

(Image credit: Matt Rourke)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany in next 6-12 months
item.description: The United States will withdraw about 5,000 troops from Germany, the Pentagon said Friday, fulfilling President Donald Trump's threat as he clashes with the German leader over the U.S. war with Iran.
item.content:encoded:
The United States will withdraw about 5,000 troops from Germany, the Pentagon said Friday, fulfilling President Donald Trump's threat as he clashes with the German leader over the U.S. war with Iran.

(Image credit: Matt Rourke)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Wyoming celebrates 'nuclear renaissance' as feds approve license for a new reactor
item.description: Construction of an advanced nuclear power plant partly funded by the U.S. government is now underway in Wyoming. The Bill Gates-backed company says its technology is proven but there are still hurdles to nuclear.
item.content:encoded:
Construction of an advanced nuclear power plant partly funded by the U.S. government is now underway in Wyoming. The Bill Gates-backed company says its technology is proven but there are still hurdles to nuclear.

(Image credit: Kirk Siegler)
item.dc:creator: Kirk Siegler

item.title: Court restricts abortion access across the US by blocking the mailing of mifepristone
item.description: A federal appeals court has restricted access to one of the most common means of abortion in the U.S. by blocking the mailing of mifepristone.
item.content:encoded:
A federal appeals court has restricted access to one of the most common means of abortion in the U.S. by blocking the mailing of mifepristone.

(Image credit: Charlie Neibergall)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: For one civil rights activist, Supreme Court ruling is 'bewildering'
item.description: Civil rights activist Leslie McLemore reflects on the recent Supreme Court decision on the Voting Rights Act, and what the ruling means for Black political representation in the South.
item.content:encoded: Civil rights activist Leslie McLemore reflects on the recent Supreme Court decision on the Voting Rights Act, and what the ruling means for Black political representation in the South.
item.dc:creator: Monika Evstatieva

item.title: Several states — and the LA public schools — are setting limits on screen time
item.description: Four states have recently passed legislation to limit teaching and assessments via screens for students. So has the United States' second-largest school district.
item.content:encoded: Four states have recently passed legislation to limit teaching and assessments via screens for students. So has the United States' second-largest school district.
item.dc:creator: Sequoia Carrillo

item.title: Fill in the blank for the quiz: The Trump admin took aim at _____ this week
item.description: This week, the federal government's been busy. There are paint jobs, fresh indictments, commemorative items and more. If you've been paying attention — good job!
item.content:encoded: This week, the federal government's been busy. There are paint jobs, fresh indictments, commemorative items and more. If you've been paying attention — good job!
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: Taking a look at looksmaxxing — and what parents should know
item.description: The trend among boys and young men of optimizing their physical appearance includes dangerous practices. Experts offer advice on how to talk to their sons about body image and healthy behaviors.
item.content:encoded:
The trend among boys and young men of optimizing their physical appearance includes dangerous practices. Experts offer advice on how to talk to their sons about body image and healthy behaviors. 

(Image credit: Malte Mueller)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: It's Day 1 of Medicaid work requirements in Nebraska. People are worried
item.description: Starting May 1, many people covered by Medicaid in Nebraska have to prove they are working. It's a requirement most states will have to implement under President Trump's budget law, beginning in January.
item.content:encoded:
Starting May 1, many people covered by Medicaid in Nebraska have to prove they are working. It's a requirement most states will have to implement under President Trump's budget law, beginning in January.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: Phil Galewitz

item.title: Passenger railroads see a sharp jump in ridership as gas prices climb
item.description: More Americans are turning to the train as gas prices reach their highest point since the war in Iran began. Brightline, the privately run railroad in Florida, had its best month ever in March.
item.content:encoded:
More Americans are turning to the train as gas prices reach their highest point since the war in Iran began. Brightline, the privately run railroad in Florida, had its best month ever in March.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose
